title: Coastal erosion assistance grant
body: "The coastal erosion assistance grant (CEAG) is a grant of £6,000 per property. It is available to support the prompt and safe demolition of homes at greatest risk of loss from erosion.  This guide explains:   how the grant works how local authorities can apply for the grant the criteria a property needs to meet to be eligible that local authorities can apply retrospectively   It is intended for local authorities wanting to apply for the grant.  "

taxons.title: River maintenance, flooding and coastal erosion
